findings.title: Remove committed AI conversation transcript
findings.impact: The new repository artifact publishes an internal AI development transcript, including assistant reasoning, model/usage metadata, and tool-call context. That information is not needed to build or validate the feature and becomes permanently visible anywhere the repository is mirrored or packaged.
findings.fix: Delete the .conversations JSONL file from the PR and keep AI/tool transcripts out of source control; if any context is useful for reviewers, summarize it in the PR description without hidden reasoning or tool metadata.
